email.description: Email address and username of the User

permissions.description: List of permissions of the User. The property name is the name of the scope.

additionalProperties.description:
Bitmask of the permissions.
* `1` - Read
* `2` - Create
* `4` - Edit
* `8` - Delete

productions.description: IDs of Productions the User has access to.
